memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t priority, uint32_t pgn, uint8_t sa, uint8_t da)
memberdef.name: syn_j1939_id_pack

briefdescription.para: Pack J1939 bitfields into a 29-bit CAN Identifier.

parameterdescription.para: Destination Address (used if PGN is PDU1 format).

briefdescription.para: Unpack a 29-bit CAN Identifier into a J1939 Header structure.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, or SYN_INVALID_PARAM if header is NULL.

briefdescription.para: Compute 24-bit Parameter Group Number from Data Page, PF, and PS.
Encode a 64-bit J1939 NAME into an 8-byte buffer.
Decode an 8-byte buffer into a 64-bit J1939 NAME structure.
Build an Address Claim CAN frame for the node.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t sa, uint8_t da, uint32_t requested_pgn, SYN_CAN_Frame *frame)
memberdef.name: syn_j1939_build_request

briefdescription.para: Build a Request PGN CAN frame (PGN 59904).

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t sa, uint32_t pgn, uint16_t total_bytes, SYN_CAN_Frame *frame)
memberdef.name: syn_j1939_build_tp_bam

briefdescription.para: Build a Transport Protocol Broadcast Announce Message (TP.CM_BAM).

parameterdescription.para: Total payload length in bytes (9 to 1785).

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t sa, uint8_t sequence, const uint8_t *payload, size_t payload_len, SYN_CAN_Frame *frame)
memberdef.name: syn_j1939_build_tp_dt

briefdescription.para: Build a Transport Protocol Data Transfer packet (TP.DT).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to payload chunk (up to 7 bytes).

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t *buf, size_t buf_size, const SYN_J1939_DTC *dtc_list, size_t dtc_count, uint8_t mil_lamp_status)
memberdef.name: syn_j1939_encode_dm1

briefdescription.para: Encode Active Diagnostic Trouble Codes into a DM1 buffer (PGN 65226).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_J1939_Node *node, const SYN_CAN_Frame *frame, uint32_t *out_pgn, const uint8_t **out_data, size_t *out_len)
memberdef.name: syn_j1939_process_frame

briefdescription.para: Process an incoming CAN frame in the J1939 node state machine.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to receiving reassembled or single-frame payload.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK if a complete J1939 message is ready, or SYN_BUSY if multi-packet assembly is in progress.

briefdescription.para: SAE J1939 Heavy-Duty Vehicle CAN Protocol Stack.

detaileddescription.para: Implements J1939 29-bit CAN ID parsing/packing, PGN definitions, Transport Protocol (TP.CM BAM & RTS/CTS), Address Claiming (J1939-81), and Active Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DM1 J1939-73).
